title: 第三日_老張登場爭吵
body:
//老張站在麵攤後面，他老婆在門口，如果啊翰還活著，他在後面一桌吃麵
Ivan Zhang: Yeah! Right! Sure!
Ivan Zhang: I hear you! Stop nagging!
Sophie Qiu: Can you make noodles or not? You're butchering that dough!
Thought: Huh? The old man is here today?
Thought: Haven't seen him in a while.
Ivan Zhang: I just need time to wake up these old hands, woman!
Sophie Qiu: Don't you "woman" me. You wife has a name!
Sophie Qiu: Spend more time in your own restaurant before you forget how to knead the dough.
//這句拉主角進對話
<<Set($DLState,老張登場爭吵叫住)>>
<<Set($TalkToChanYenOnStreet,0)>>
Sophie Qiu: Ah, Mr. Dai.
Sophie Qiu: For dinner?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Evening.
    Sophie Qiu: Good evening.
->I'm off to work.
->Sorry, already had my dinner.
    Sophie Qiu: Ah.
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Set($DLState,老張登場爭吵靠近)>>
Ivan Zhang: Leave him alone.
Sophie Qiu: It's called customer service!
Sophie Qiu: Oh, this is my hubby. Felix Zhang.
Ivan Zhang: Shut up. He doesn't want to know me.
Sophie Qiu: Learn to greet your customers, old mule!
Ivan Zhang: ...
Ivan Zhang: Table 4's ordering a bowl of plain noodles.
Sophie Qiu: On it!
//if啊和活著
<<#If($WrongSyringe=true)>>
    Albert Tsai: I'll cover table 4.
    Ivan Zhang: You're officially off work. Finish your noodles and get lost.
    Sophie Qiu: Be nice!
    Ivan Zhang: Hmph.
<<#EndIf>>
Sophie Qiu: Have a nice day, Mr. Dai!
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Thank you.
->I'll sure have dinner here next time!
    Sophie Qiu: Ah, a nice guy.
    Sophie Qiu: Unlike my hubby, who was born in a barn.
    Ivan Zhang: Oi!
    Sophie Qiu: Learn your manners!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>
//老闆娘走道麵攤後面

title: 第二日_修車
body:
//一個人在機車旁，靠近可以互動
<<Set($DLStateFloat,-1)>>
Reynold Zhao: Hey, mister!
Reynold Zhao: Could you do me a quick favor?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服2_側轉正)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->What kind of favor?
    //
->Why me?
    Reynold Zhao: Because you look like a nice guy!
->Sure.
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,0)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Set($DLState,靠近修車囉)>>
Reynold Zhao: Could you check if there's anything coming out of my exhaust pipe?
Reynold Zhao: I don't think this bike is working as it's supposed to.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Sure thing.
    Reynold Zhao: Thank you. I really can't see the pipe while riding it.
->No.
    //IF剛剛答應
    <<#If($DLStateFloat=0)>>
        Reynold Zhao: But you agreed?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->I didn't sign up for this much trouble.
            Reynold Zhao: Okay! I'll ask someone else!
            <<#End>>
        ->Okay, I'll do it.
            Reynold Zhao: Thank you. I really can't see the pipe while riding it.
            <<#GoTo(@確認答應幫修車)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    Reynold Zhao: ...Okay.
    Reynold Zhao: I'll somehow work this out. Hmph.
    <<#End>>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<@確認答應幫修車>>
//那個人淡入淡出做到車上發動車子
<<Set($DLState,啟動機車開燈)>>
Reynold Zhao: How's it going? Anything coming out? Smoke?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Nothing at all.
    Reynold Zhao: Niiice.
->Probably not.
    Reynold Zhao: Is that yes or no?
    Reynold Zhao: Hey!
<<#EndSimple>>
Reynold Zhao: It seems to be working now. There must be a pebble or something stuck in the hover engine.
<<#Simple(10)>>
->Hover engine?
->This bike has a hover engine?
    Reynold Zhao: It's old alright, but hover engine isn't exactly so new.
    Reynold Zhao: I've been riding it as regular bike, until recently they repaved this road.
    Reynold Zhao: Now I can hover! Nice savings on gas.
    <<#Simple(10)>>
    ->Your hover engine doesn't work unless they repave the road?
    ->Savings on gas? How?
        Reynold Zhao: Don't you ever ride a bike?
        Reynold Zhao: I thought everybody knew that?
        Reynold Zhao: Okay. Since you did me this favor, let me bring you up to speed.
        Reynold Zhao: The government has been doing roadways upgrade for days now.
        Reynold Zhao: These new roads have a hover layer beneath the asphalt. It pushes vehicles up, and navigates them with public AI.
        Reynold Zhao: Route planning, self-driving, all taken care of.
        Reynold Zhao: Since the power comes from the road, I don't need to spend a penny on gas.
        Reynold Zhao: Not every road is upgraded, though. Like, small alleys are left out.
        Reynold Zhao: So, bikes these days have two drive modes, just in case. Use wheels when hover engine isn't working.
        Reynold Zhao: Get it?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Got it.
            Reynold Zhao: Ha, I should find a teaching job.
        ->Not quite...?
            Reynold Zhao: Use your internet!
            Reynold Zhao: I've explained enough!
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Reynold Zhao: Good. The bike is all settled.
Reynold Zhao: Let me fire it up...
<<Set($DLState,啟動機車懸浮成功)>>
<<#Wait(3)>>
Reynold Zhao: Awww yes!
Reynold Zhao: Thank you.
Reynold Zhao: Have a good one!
<<#End>>
//車子懸浮飛走

title: 第三日_巨威
body:
Reese Qiu: Hey, I saw your lil bro's social update. He found a job?
Pamella Wu: Yep. Growell.
Reese Qiu: That real estate developer who built like half the houses in the country!?
Pamella Wu: Yeah. Pulled some of his gangster strings to land the job.
Reese Qiu: Are you jealous or what?
Reese Qiu: Ask him to pull those strings again. He won't mind giving big sis a hand.
Pamella Wu: Tsk. I don't want to work for a mega-sized mafia, okay?
<<Set($DLState,第三日_巨威)>>
<<#End>>

//MBU_店面人物_客人L、MBU_機車人物_F

title: 第三日_義肢
第二日_人造子宮
第二日_扭蛋抽卡
body: Merton Zhang: Fuck this! Missed again! Tevin Chu: Chill, dude. Tevin Chu: How much have you spent? Merton Zhang: 400... Tevin Chu: Hahaha! Tevin Chu: 400 on a gacha machine and got nothing!? Merton Zhang: Shut up! Merton Zhang: How much have you spent on microtransactions in your silly mobile game? Tevin Chu: Not the same thing. You're paying for plastic junk. I'm investing in waifu. Merton Zhang: Yeah, go kiss your .jpg waifu. Tevin Chu: Waifu is waifu, dude! Merton Zhang: I swear I'm gonna get it this time. Tevin Chu: Why are you trying so hard? Merton Zhang: Leilah said she liked a figure in this new series, called Pooper or wossname. I've got to get it for her. Tevin Chu: Oooo, waifu in real laifu. Merton Zhang: Shut up. <> <<#End>>

title: 第四日_預沒區
body:
Maynerd Tse: Yo, check out my new girl!
Darrel Chang: She's all over your timeline, bro.
Maynerd Tse: Nice tits, eh? Tell you what, I'm actually in love with her smarts.
Darrel Chang: She's from the evacuation zone.
Maynerd Tse: So what? Not everyone from the evacuation zone is a criminal.
Darrel Chang: You watch out. Dating scam is a thing these days.
Maynerd Tse: Tsk. Jealous.
<<Set($DLState,第四日_預沒區)>>
<<#End>>

title: 第三日_扭蛋抽卡
body:
Tamsyn Chien: Just give it a break, Leilah.
Tamsyn Chien: You already have a bunch. Which of them exactly are you going for?
Leilah Huang: Pooper.
Tamsyn Chien: What? I thought you don't like it?
Tamsyn Chien: Yesterday you said it's ugly, yes?
Leilah Huang: But somehow Tevin is obsessed with it!
Tamsyn Chien: Ha, you're doing this for him?
Leilah Huang: Yes! Can't I?
Tamsyn Chien: Sure, knock yourself out.
Leilah Huang: Hey! What do you mean by that?
Tamsyn Chien: I mean, keep trying and good luck!
<<Set($DLState,第三日_扭蛋抽卡)>>
<<#End>>

title: 第四日_雞蛋糕
tags: MBU_街景人物_蛋糕客人D、MBU_街景人物_蛋糕老闆
body:
Trudy Yang: Hey! How much longer do I have to wait?
Linton Tsai: Almost there! Two more takeout orders, then it's your turn.
Trudy Yang: What takeout orders? I'm here first!
Linton Tsai: Online orders. They beat you to it.
Trudy Yang: Kill me already...
<<Set($DLState,第四日_雞蛋糕)>>
<<#End>>

title: 第二日_颱風
body: Fawn Yang: They say there's a typhoon coming this week. Bob Zhang: Sweeet. Hope it's a big one. Then we can have a typhoon break. Fawn Yang: The weather forecast says it's gonna be pretty big. Bob Zhang: I don't trust them anymore. Bob Zhang: They said the same thing last time and there was no typhoon break. We still had to go to school. Fawn Yang: Blame the mayor. He wouldn't declare an emergency unless it's literally the end of the world. Fawn Yang: But this time around, I'm sure we will have a break. Bob Zhang: Want to bet? Fawn Yang: The wager is? Bob Zhang: How about three breakfasts? Fawn Yang: Like, the winner can ask for anything? Bob Zhang: Of course. Fawn Yang: Count me in! Fawn Yang: I'll order stuff from three districts over, then you pay and pick up. Haha. Bob Zhang: Not a problem. I'll just pay them to deliver. Fawn Yang: If you can afford. <> <<#End>>

title: 第四日_蘭花黨
tags: MBU_店面人物_吃麵D、MBU_店面人物_吃麵G
body:
Sharyl Huang: Geez. These people should die and rot in hell.
Patricia Liu: Put the phone away and focus on your food.
Sharyl Huang: Oh, okay...
Patricia Liu: ...
Patricia Liu: Were you talking about the explosion in the evacuation zone yesterday?
Sharyl Huang: Yeah. These Moonflowers are terrorists of the worst kind.
Sharyl Huang: The police should arrest and execute them all.
Patricia Liu: ...
Patricia Liu: They expose corrupted officials and under-the-counter deals online every now and then, no?
Patricia Liu: That is the spirit of the original Moonflower Movement.
Sharyl Huang: What spirit? It's a riot.
Sharyl Huang: And now they have grown into terrorists.
Patricia Liu: Hey, did the Moonflowers claim responsibility for the explosion?
Sharyl Huang: I don't think so. But the police says they are the prime suspect.
Sharyl Huang: Plus, they have done similar things before and claimed responsibility. It's nothing new.
Patricia Liu: Don't jump to conclusions just yet.
Sharyl Huang: ...
Sharyl Huang: Why are you defending them, mom?
Patricia Liu: I—
Patricia Liu: Never mind. Let's forget about them for now.
Sharyl Huang: Oh, sure.
<<Set($DLState,第四日_蘭花黨)>>
<<#End>>

title: 第二日_摸狗
body:
Thought: Good doggie...
Thought: Sooo cute.
Lizzy Hsu: There's a fee for petting the dog, mister.;<<Play(徐倩璇,MBU_店面人物_檳榔西施_換腳)>>
<<Set($DLState,檳榔西施叫主角了)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Huh?
->Sorry, is this your dog?
<<#EndSimple>>
Lizzy Hsu: Gotcha! I was kidding.
Lizzy Hsu: He's a stray. People in this neighborhood keep feeding him.
Lizzy Hsu: Then I thought maybe I should adopt him.
Lizzy Hsu: You can feed him, but do bring nicer dog treats.
Lizzy Hsu: People feed him all sorts of fancy stuff. Hard to impress.
Lizzy Hsu: Hey handsome, I've never seen you before.
Lizzy Hsu: You live nearby?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yep.
    Lizzy Hsu: Nice.
->Sort of.
    Lizzy Hsu: How close is "sort of"? Haha!
<<#EndSimple>>
Lizzy Hsu: Come by sometime!
Lizzy Hsu: Just in case you're wondering, I don't have a boyfriend yet.
<<#Simple(10)>>
->Sure, I'll be your best patron.
    Lizzy Hsu: Yay!
->But I have a girlfriend.
    Lizzy Hsu: Oh, sorry.
    Lizzy Hsu: Forget about that, then.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lizzy Hsu: Bye. See you again!
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Bye!
->See you.
->...
<<Play(徐倩璇,MBU_店面人物_檳榔西施_換腳返回)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 第四日_網紅飲料店
body:
Sid Sun: How much do I owe you?
Franklyn Lin: 220
Sid Sun: What the!? For a bubble tea? Bloody robbery!
Franklyn Lin: It's BoBo's shop.
Sid Sun: What the heck is BoBo?
Franklyn Lin: BoBo the YouTuber! Everyone knows him!
Sid Sun: Who?
Franklyn Lin: The one who makes famous prank videos and got sued? Remember?
Sid Sun: Whatever. You're telling me this bubble tea is stupidly expensive because what, the shop owner is famous?
Franklyn Lin: No, it's not your regular bubble or your average tea.
Franklyn Lin: Just watch BoBo's channel. He explained it all.
Sid Sun: So, on top of 220, which is a ridiculous figure, I've got to contribute clicks to his channel?
Franklyn Lin: Don't be a cynic dick, man. Gimme the bubble tea if you don't want it.
Sid Sun: Gimme back my 220.
Franklyn Lin: Nope!
Sid Sun: Damn.
<<Set($DLState,第四日_網紅飲料店)>>
<<#End>>

title: 第二日_放任小孩
第二日_抱怨運費
body:
Ruth Huang: The build is pretty nice. Yeah, it's genuine.
Ruth Huang: These dents must be delivery damage.
Ruth Huang: That courier company you keep using is crap. Try mine. Much better service.
Ruth Huang: You can tell from their delivery drones. All banged up. How could they keep the cargo safe?
Ruth Huang: Cheap is good. Cheap and crappy is bad.
<<Set($DLState,第二日_抱怨運費)>>
<<#End>>

//MBU_機車人物_G

title: 第二日_點餐點多久
body:
Melinda Chen: What's wrong with this thing...?
Melinda Chen: Scan this QR code, right? But I don't see any menu popping up?
Charmaine Sue: Actually, you can just order from me, miss.
Melinda Chen: No, no worries! I can handle this QR code!
Charmaine Sue: Ah, okay...
<<Set($DLState,第二日_點餐點多久)>>
<<#End>>
//MBU_熱炒人物_客人D
//蘇巧敏耀順一根打開過來

title: 第三日_偷看西施
body:
Zayne Zhu: Enjoying the view?
Kris Huang: Huh?
Zayne Zhu: Don't play dumb. You've been watching that betel nut girl for a while.
Kris Huang: You can tell?
Zayne Zhu: I'm not blind, pervert...
<<Set($DLState,第三日_偷看西施)>>
<<#End>>

title: 第三日_是要點多久
body:
Charmaine Sue: You can just order with me, sir. It's alright!
Spencer Wang: Gimme one minute. I almost figured it out.
Spencer Wang: Order extra... Tempura... Why isn't it working?
Spencer Wang: Oops, I tapped the X button. Gotta scan the QR code again...
Charmaine Sue: You can just tell me what you need...
<<Set($DLState,第三日_是要點多久)>>
<<#End>>
//MBU_熱炒人物_客人E

title: 第三日_兩女抽菸
body:
Velda Zhang: Hmm? What's this cigarette?
Cecily Li:Smooth, right?
Cecily Li:Got it from the Shithole.
Velda Zhang: Watch out. They could be laced with narcotics.
Cecily Li:Don't you worry about that. I've tried it out!
<<Set($DLState,第三日_兩女抽菸)>>
<<#End>>

//MBU_站立人物_女性、MBU_機車人物_D

title: 第四日_買泡麵
body:
Virgil Zhang: I'm gonna hoard up instant noodles. What flavor do you want?
Virgil Zhang: Why hoard up? There's a hurricane coming tomorrow!
Virgil Zhang: No restaurant, no delivery. All grocery stores are closed. What you gonna eat?
Virgil Zhang: What's wrong with instant noodles? Huh? Unhealthy?
Virgil Zhang: Five packs of noodles a day won't kill me. It's not like I'm living on it!
Virgil Zhang: Hello!?
Virgil Zhang: Damn, she hung up...
<<Set($DLState,第四日_買泡麵)>>
<<#End>>
//MBU_機車人物_E

title: 第四日_打遊戲
body:
Kash Wu: Hurry! Flood them bastards!
Dominick Huang: Slow the hell down! Your dragon's out of HP.
Stu Lin: Hey, your home base...
Kash Wu: Shit! Where's my home base!? Razed? By whom?
Dominick Huang: ...
Kash Wu: ...
Stu Lin: ...
Kash Wu: ...Let's just start over.
Stu Lin: Take a break. Dinner's ready!
<<Set($DLState,第四日_打遊戲)>>
<<#End>>
//MBU_站立人物_學生B

title: 第三日_吉他背書
body:
Mike Liang: Put that guitar down. The final exam's coming next week. Study before you run out of time.
Tobias Li: Nope. I'm gonna fail it anyway.
Tobias Li: Why bother? If death is my fate, I choose to die with style.
Mike Liang: ...You're hopeless.
Tobias Li: No, there is hope. You will let me copy your answers.
Mike Liang: In your dreams.
<<Set($DLState,第三日_吉他背書)>>
<<#End>>

title: 第四日_廖幫
body:
Rozanne Huang: Do you happen to have any connections in Lions League?
Cate Liu: Lions League? They dissolved years ago.
Rozanne Huang: Eh? I heard they're still around.
Cate Liu: Heard from whom?
Rozanne Huang: My girlfriend. She saw people with full face tattoo hanging around the evacuation zone.
Cate Liu: Having full face tattoo doesn't necessarily make them Lions League.
Rozanne Huang: Okay. It's just that I have this job they might be interested in.
<<Set($DLState,第四日_廖幫)>>
<<#End>>

title: 第三日_等車老夫婦
body:
Scarlett Lin: Is the bus here yet?
Curt Li: No.
Scarlett Lin: How long is it gonna take? I'm boiling hot.
Curt Li: Hot? It's December.
Scarlett Lin: I have a healthy metabolism!
Scarlett Lin: How much longer do we have to wait? I need air conditioning.
Curt Li: You need mind conditioning. Calm down and you will cool down.
<<Set($DLState,第三日_等車老夫婦)>>
<<#End>>

title: 第四日_抱怨同事
body:
Calvin Tsai:Not just a job! I need a career! A job with a future!
Calvin Tsai:Silencio? Seriously? That old junk could be shut down any day!
Calvin Tsai:What? You don't know yet?
Calvin Tsai:Okay, there will be an announcement soon enough. Everyone at HQ is talking about Silencio.
Calvin Tsai:Trust you? How can I trust someone who's living under a rock?
Calvin Tsai:Ah, yeah, I don't have anyone else...
<<Set($DLState,第四日_抱怨同事)>>
<<#End>>
